model: LANCER EVOLUTION VI TOMMI MAKINEN EDITION RS
prestazioni: Engine: 4G63T (7th-gen block, 85mm bore, 88mm stroke, forged crank, 10.0:1 CR) with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 58mm inducer, 82mm exducer) paired with a Tomei 272°/12.0mm lift camshaft set (MIVEC-compatible) and HKS Hi-Power Metal Head Gasket (1.2mm thickness) for 1.5-bar boost on E85 fuel blend.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.5-way, 450 lb-ft torque capacity) in the front differential, Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way mechanical LSD in the rear, and a Tilton 7.25" twin-disc carbon clutch (360 lb-ft torque rating) with a billet flywheel (12.5 lbs) for launch control optimization.

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear ride height adjustment) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm front and 900N/mm rear springs, Whiteline adjustable front sway bar (24mm hollow, 3-position) and Cusco rear sway bar (22mm solid), paired with SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms).
estetica: Exterior: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (prepreg carbon fiber, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with a custom Tommi Mäkinen Edition-inspired livery (Ralliart Blue with white/red accents, hand-painted by Fatlace Designs) and a Voltex Type-5 rear wing (3D carbon, 1200mm span, 300mm chord) on custom aluminum mounts.

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (17x9 +22 front, 17x10.5 +30 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear) and Project Kics R40 6-pot front/4-pot rear brake kit (356mm rotors, 2-piece floating design) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.

Interior: Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats (FRP shell, FIA 8855-1999 certified) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede) on a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom half-cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point with door bars) by Custom Cages UK.
